Year: The year the data was collected
Remote_Workers_Percentage: The percentage of the customer service team that worked remotely
In_Office_Workers_Percentage: The percentage of the customer service team that worked in the office
Hybrid_Workers_Percentage: The percentage of the customer service team that used a hybrid work model
Remote_Workers_Location_BC: The percentage of remote workers that are located in British Columbia
Remote_Workers_Location_ON: The percentage of remote workers that are located in Ontario
Remote_Workers_Location_AB: The percentage of remote workers that are located in Alberta
